title: Junior Instructional Designer at IDP Education India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IDP Education India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IDP Education India International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About IDP Education India International Enterprises:
IDP Education India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India International Enterprises!
